characters.name: Caelum
characters.description: Every round below 40% HP, base DMG increases by +3 (max +9 DMG bonus at lowest HP).

characters.name: Nyxara
characters.description: Alternates every round: Odd rounds → +10% DMG | Even rounds → -10% DMG taken.

characters.name: Valdris
characters.description: Starts every match with 4CP. Every round win gives +1 extra CP on top of normal gain.

characters.name: Liora
characters.description: Every round accuracy above 80% heals 3HP (capped at 15HP total heal per match).

characters.name: Malachar
characters.description: Every round opponent deals damage, Malachar gains +2 DMG permanently.

characters.name: Zephon
characters.description: Every round WPM > 80 gains +1 CP automatically. Stacks every qualifying round.

characters.name: Riven
characters.description: Deals high damage but loses 3HP every round. Win 2 consecutive rounds to pause self-damage for 1 round.
